title: Fluffy Banana Pancakes
description: Light and fluffy pancakes with caramelized banana slices and maple syrup.
steps: Mash one banana in a bowl. Whisk in the egg, milk, and melted butter.
In another bowl, mix flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
Combine wet and dry ingredients, stirring until just mixed (a few lumps are fine).
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat with a small knob of butter.
Pour about 1/4 cup of batter per pancake. Cook until bubbles form on the surface, then flip. Cook another 1-2 minutes.
Slice the remaining banana. Serve pancakes topped with banana slices, a pat of butter, and maple syrup.
